title: Elytra Craft
description: Datapack that adds craft elytra to minecraft!
body:
Take to the skies with the "Elytra Craft" data pack! This data pack allows you to create Elytra, a unique item that will allow you to take to the skies and explore the world of Minecraft to new heights. Discover new horizons and feel the freedom of flight


!![с](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f7b01e181b4a3ed68d5357775f7a94988e6f34c.png)
